name: LinkedIn published to Bluesky + Threads cross-post

parameters.content:
## LinkedIn → Bluesky + Threads cross-post

When a LinkedIn post publishes, Posta fires an outbound webhook. This workflow verifies it, fetches the published caption, compresses it per network with an LLM, and creates **draft** Bluesky and Threads versions for you to review.

### Setup

- [ ] Point a Posta **outbound webhook** at the `Posta webhook` node's URL, scoped to `post.published` on LinkedIn (Posta dashboard → Webhooks)
- [ ] Set `POSTA_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in n8n env (the signing secret from the webhook endpoint)
- [ ] Add **Header Auth** credentials: `Posta API` (`Authorization: Bearer posta_…`) and `OpenAI API` (`Authorization: Bearer sk-…`)
- [ ] Set your Bluesky and Threads Posta account ids on the two Create-post nodes
- [ ] Set `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL` in n8n env for the review ping (or delete the Slack node)

### Signature scheme

Posta signs `HMAC-SHA256(secret, "{X-Posta-Timestamp}.{rawBody}")` and sends it as `X-Posta-Signature`. The Code node verifies exactly that (constant-time, raw body).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Cross-post drafts ready for review:\n• Bluesky: https://getposta.app/app/posts/' + $('Create Bluesky draft').item.json.id + '\n• Threads: https://getposta.app/app/posts/' + $('Create Threads draft').item.json.id }) }}
